---
title: "Variance of a Sum from a 2x2 Covariance Matrix"
subtitle: "Minimal Quarto + reveal.js + Manim example"
author: "Your Name"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
    css: slides.css
    transition: slide
    incremental: true
    slide-number: true
    mathjax: default
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Variance of a Sum

We want to explain this identity clearly:

$$
\mathrm{Var}(X+Y)=\mathrm{Var}(X)+\mathrm{Var}(Y)+2\,\mathrm{Cov}(X,Y)
$$

---

## Formula Walkthrough

$$
\Sigma=
\begin{bmatrix}
\mathrm{Var}(X) & \mathrm{Cov}(X,Y) \\
\mathrm{Cov}(X,Y) & \mathrm{Var}(Y)
\end{bmatrix}
$$

::: incremental
- First, read the diagonal entries as variances.
- Then read the off-diagonal entries as covariances.
- For $X+Y$, all four entries contribute when expanded.
- The two covariance terms are identical, so they combine to $2\,\mathrm{Cov}(X,Y)$.
:::

---

## Manim Animation {#manim-slide}

<!-- Why this exists: We use a plain HTML video tag so reveal.js plays a pre-rendered MP4. -->
<!-- Why this exists: The path is relative to this .qmd file and should point to assets/variance_sum.mp4. -->
<!-- Why this exists: No autoplay attribute here; JS below starts/resets playback when this slide becomes active. -->
<video id="variance-video" src="assets/variance_sum.mp4" muted playsinline preload="metadata">
  Your browser does not support the video tag.
</video>

---

## Why This Matters in Quantitative Genetics

$$
\mathrm{Var}(X+Y)=\mathrm{Var}(X)+\mathrm{Var}(Y)+2\,\mathrm{Cov}(X,Y)
$$

This identity underlies many decomposition arguments:

- Partitioning phenotypic variance into components
- Understanding when covariance terms can be ignored (or cannot)
- Building intuition before moving to matrix-based mixed models

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  if (!window.Reveal) return;

  const deck = window.Reveal;
  // Force transition style in case defaults from another Quarto profile override YAML.
  deck.configure({
    transition: "slide",
    backgroundTransition: "slide"
  });

  const video = document.getElementById("variance-video");
  if (!video) return;

  function updateVideoPlayback(event) {
    const slide = event.currentSlide;
    const onVideoSlide = slide && slide.id === "manim-slide";

    if (onVideoSlide) {
      video.currentTime = 0;
      const playPromise = video.play();
      if (playPromise && typeof playPromise.catch === "function") {
        playPromise.catch(() => {});
      }
    } else {
      video.pause();
      video.currentTime = 0;
    }
  }

  deck.on("ready", updateVideoPlayback);
  deck.on("slidechanged", updateVideoPlayback);
});
</script>
```
